---
title: ""
page-layout: full
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
nocite: '@*'
toc: false
---

::: {.column-page}

:::: {style="display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; align-items: flex-start; padding: 2rem 0;"}

::::: {style="flex: 0 0 auto;"}
![](assets/ME.jpg){width=200 style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::::

::::: {style="flex: 1;"}
# Satyajeet Bhonsale

**Postdoctoral Researcher**  
BioTeC+, KU Leuven, Belgium

I develop uncertainty-aware mathematical models and scientific machine learning methods
for (bio)pharmaceutical processes. My work is guided by a simple question *how can we make reliable decisions using models we know are wrong?*
Drawing on mechanistic modelling, uncertainty quantification, and hybrid SciML approaches,
I build computational tools that are not just predictive, but credible for real-world
decision-making in pharmaceutical and bioprocess engineering.
:::::

::::

:::

## Publications

For the latest list see [Lirias](https://lirias.kuleuven.be/cv?Username=u0093798) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=4wF-Y68AAAAJ&hl=en).

::: {#refs}
:::
